dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: When was the Customer Experience team created at Elexion Automotive?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: The Customer Experience team was created at Elexion Automotive on May 20, 2015, one year before the arrival of current team lead Ryan Thompson.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: As of first quarter 2025, what percentage of incoming calls were found to be automated?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: During recent audits, 3.7% of customer service calls were found to be from automated callers.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: Can customers call Elexion to speak to a live customer service representative at any time?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: A global network of 50 call services ensures each call is handled by a Customer Service Specialist in under one hour at any time of the day during the entire week.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many total service calls did Elexion have in 2024?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Based on the 2024 Customer Service Internal Report, Elexion recorded 1265 service calls in the field and 2824 in-house services.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: What is Elexion's average turnaround time for scheduling service appointments for customers?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Per the 2024 Customer Service team annual review, customer service specialists typically needed between 1 and 3 hours to coordinate service appointments for customers.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: What percentage of active customers respond to customer service surveys are collected each month?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: An average of 40% of active customers per month respond to customer service surveys.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How many staff retreats did the Customer Service Team have in 2024?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: In 2024, the Customer Service Team had 3 staff retreats, in March, July, and November. During these all-day meetings, the team focused on strategizing new initiatives to increase sales and customer retention for the 2025 year.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: Do Elexion Automotive's customer service representatives work more efficiently when they have the weekend off?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Yes. According to our end-of-year 2024 data, all 42 of our customer service representatives work more efficiently after having a day or two off. We know that if we overwork our employees, we lose productivity. The data shows a 21% increase in productivity for rested employees.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How does Elexion's reported customer satisfaction rate on warranties compare to the industry standard of 75%?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Since 2022, Elexion leads the industry with a higher than 80% satisfaction rate on its warranties, based on the company's 2024 Customer Service Report.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: How long are the auto warranties that Elexion Automotive offers as part of its after sales product suite as of August 1, 2025?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: As of August 1, 2025, Elexion Automotive offers a 10-year warranty standard with all purchases.

dr_report_evaluation_qa.question: Do returning customers cite warranty length as a reason for their repeat purchases from Elexion?
dr_report_evaluation_qa.answer: Based on our 2025 tracking data of 20,132 customers who purchased another vehicle from Elexion within five years of purchasing their first, 16,562 cited the warranty length as a reason for doing so.
